rationale: Candidate 3de005fc0d2a9ca5c5425dba1d1a5f9ae3af3311 is a schemaVersion 3 embeddedknowledge-lesson-v1 production pack for PREM-LPP-005 version 0.1.0 at standard risk tier, mapped to topic-orientation-study-plan with prerequisite topic-orientation-metacognition-and-error-log. The governance commit 4018c77ca01cb1de1f41bd0356646a52ae5cb107 adds only the three review artifacts, so the frozen teaching content was not changed after review. I counted only the three non-dismissed GitHub COMMENTED review submissions by actor VSBDev on July 20, 2026 that target commit 3de005fc0d2a9ca5c5425dba1d1a5f9ae3af3311 and are canonically equivalent to the committed review artifacts: REV-PREM-LPP-005-ACADEMIC-20260720-2ACF634D, REV-PREM-LPP-005-LEARNINGDESIGN-01, and REV-PREM-LPP-005-ACCESS-20260720-EB2602DF. I excluded the earlier COMMENTED submissions on superseded candidate a519ad263e28e240c74e2558ab70dffad7ccdcc3 as stale. The eligible set provides 3 approvals across the required academic, learning-design, and accessibility-rights roles, 1 distinct principal, 3 distinct agent runs, and 3 distinct declared model families, satisfying standard-lesson-v2. No counted review contains an unresolved major or blocking finding. The stale accessibility-rights blocker about learner-facing raw internal IDs was resolved in the frozen candidate, and the remaining counted concerns are non-blocking notes or bounded limitations. Limitations remain: this is founding-stage same-principal governance with disclosed and attested rather than externally verified provenance; the learning-design review shares the same accountable principal even though that overlap is permitted by policy; the accessibility-rights reviewer could not inspect a freshly rendered build in this environment; and there is no learner-effectiveness evidence. On that record, merge is justified if the maintainer makes only the allowed governance commit, preserves GitHub review provenance, and reruns repository validation and provenance checks before merge.
conditions: Commit this adjudication with only the allowed governance changes: add adjudication.json, set lesson.json status and sourceConfidence to the post-review values permitted by policy, and set every retained claims.json reviewStatus to reviewed; do not edit teaching content or other claims-ledger fields.

Rerun npm ci, npm run validate, and the repository's PR-readiness and GitHub-provenance checks in an environment with the required Node dependencies before merge; if any failure requires teaching-content edits, freeze a new candidate and repeat review quorum and adjudication.

Preserve the three counted GitHub COMMENTED review submissions and their artifact equivalence; dismissing or editing those submissions, or changing candidate content from 3de005fc0d2a9ca5c5425dba1d1a5f9ae3af3311, stales this adjudication and the counted approvals.
